message:
fix(store,audit): zone index race, percentile overflow, and timestamp verification

- fcp-store object_store: move zone_index update before dropping objects
  lock to prevent orphan entries from concurrent delete()
- fcp-store repair: use u64 arithmetic in percentile_bps() to prevent
  overflow when len * percentile exceeds usize::MAX
- fcp-store quarantine: document benign TOCTOU in promote() and clarify
  error precedence (NotFound before PromotionDenied/SchemaValidationFailed)
- fcp-audit: add timestamp_regression warning to verify_chain() detecting
  non-monotonic occurred_at values in audit log chains

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
